title: AudioPaLM: A Large Language Model That Can Speak and Listen
why_it_matters: Early reference point for combining a strong text LLM with audio-language modeling to support speech understanding and generation.
next: Use as a baseline for the question: what does native audio add beyond ASR plus text LLM?

title: SpeechGPT: Empowering Large Language Models with Intrinsic Cross-Modal Conversational Abilities
why_it_matters: Useful for thinking about speech-native conversational modeling and discrete speech representations.
next: Extract architecture assumptions and compare with later audio LLM systems.

title: SALMONN: Towards Generic Hearing Abilities for Large Language Models
why_it_matters: Frames audio LLMs as generic hearing systems across speech, audio events, and music.
next: Deep read for capability taxonomy and emergent audio reasoning claims.

title: Qwen-Audio: Advancing Universal Audio Understanding via Unified Large-Scale Audio-Language Models
why_it_matters: Strong public reference for universal audio understanding across speech, sounds, music, and multi-turn audio chat.
next: Use as an anchor for evaluating broad audio understanding claims.

title: Dynamic-SUPERB: Towards a Dynamic, Collaborative, and Comprehensive Instruction-Tuning Benchmark for Speech
why_it_matters: Relevant benchmark framing for instruction-following speech models and broad speech task coverage.
next: Check which tasks map to useful spoken interaction scenarios.

title: AudioBench: A Universal Benchmark for Audio Large Language Models
why_it_matters: Useful public benchmark for tracking audio LLM behavior across speech, audio scene, and voice/paralinguistic tasks.
next: Compare benchmark tasks against product-relevant spoken workflows.

title: High Fidelity Neural Audio Compression
why_it_matters: EnCodec is a foundational neural audio codec and a useful reference point for audio tokenization.
next: Summarize what it preserves and what may matter for downstream audio LLM behavior.

title: Low Frame-rate Speech Codec: a Codec Designed for Fast High-quality Speech LLM Training and Inference
why_it_matters: Directly connects codec frame rate with faster speech LLM training and inference, making it central for useful compression work.
next: Deep read and extract evaluation dimensions for codec-as-LLM-interface.

title: Codec-SUPERB @ SLT 2024: A Lightweight Benchmark for Neural Audio Codec Models
why_it_matters: Provides a benchmark angle for comparing codec preservation of information useful to speech/audio modeling.
next: Check whether its metrics align with audio LLM usefulness.
